content_fingerprint: openai rolls out realtime voice models with reasoning translation and transcription in the api openai has shipped a new family of realtime voice models to its api adding reasoning translation and transcription capabilities aimed at developers building natural multimodal voice experiences openai published a newsroom entry on may 7 2026 announcing new realtime voice models now available in the openai api the models are designed to handle speech reasoning translation and transcription in a single pipeline enabling more fluid voice interactions than conventional speech to text to llm chains the an
